title: Yomiko Yorkshire Terrier (Small)
features: Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics, Dogs - Small Yorkshire Terrier
Black and tan soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details to the face
Part of the Suki Classics lifelike animals collections
Suki Classics are the most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all!
description: Product Description Supersoft plush small Yorkshire Terrier from Suki International Gifts Classics Dog collection. Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Approximately 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Box Contains 1 x Small Yorkshire Terrier
